direct_pc_sources.en: Everyone is calling me a puppet... While it is true I may not have much power, it is no fault of mine. The CBMiyoshi ClanCZ just came to our aid in the battle.

わしのことを皆、傀儡と呼んでいる…
確かに実権はないが、それも致し方ない。
あの戦いに貢献したのはCB三好家CZの者じゃ。
direct_pc_sources.sc:
大家都把我称为傀儡……
虽然手中确实没有实权，但这实属无奈。
对那场战争有贡献的是CB三好家CZ的人。
direct_pc_sources.tc:
眾人稱我傀儡……
我的確沒有實權，但實屬無奈。
那場戰爭，CB三好家CZ的人貢獻甚鉅。

direct_pc_sources.en: As advisor to the Kamakura Kubª, the Kantª Kanrei occupied an important role, and excluding the early stages of the Muromachi Shªgunate, the shªgun in the CCcapitalCZ had always appointed clan leaders of the CBUesugi ClanCZ to the position.

関東管領は鎌倉公方を補佐する要職であり、
室町幕府初期を除き、歴代CB上杉家CZの当主が
京の将軍から直々に任命されていた。

除了早期的室町幕府，历代的CB上杉家CZ当家

direct_pc_sources.en: The CBKoga KubªCZ also became embroiled in this civil war, and as ruination swept CCKantªCZ, the CB¥gigayatsu ClanCZ invited CASªun HªjªCZ into the fray and reaped the benefits of his ferocity.

この内乱は、CB古河公方家CZをも巻き込み、
CC関東CZが疲弊していく中、CB扇谷家CZが招き入れた
CA北条早雲CZという猛虎が漁夫の利をさらった。
direct_pc_sources.sc:
这场内乱也波及到了CB古河公方CZ的人。
就在CC关东CZ日益疲敝之时，CB扇谷家CZ招揽的
猛虎——CA北条早云CZ坐收渔人之利。

這場內亂亦捲入CB古河公方家CZ，
正當CC關東CZ疲弊之際，CB扇谷家CZ迎入的猛虎，
CA北條早雲CZ坐收漁夫之利。

direct_pc_sources.en: When CASªunCZÖs grandson CAUjiyasuCZ came into power, he annihilated the CB¥gigayatsu ClanCZ at the Battle of Kawagoe and attempted to do the same to their related CBYamanouchi Uesugi ClanCZ.

CA早雲CZの孫であるCA氏康CZの代に至って
河越合戦でCB扇谷家CZを滅亡させ、今また
嫡流のCB山内上杉家CZも滅ぼさんとしていた。
direct_pc_sources.sc:
到了CA早云CZ之孙CA氏康CZ一代，
北条家在河越会战中消灭了CB扇谷家CZ，
这次又打算毁灭嫡系的CB山内上杉家CZ。
direct_pc_sources.tc:
至CA早雲CZ之孫的CA氏康CZ之代，
於河越合戰上滅CB扇谷家CZ之後，
現在企圖毀滅嫡系的CB山內上杉家CZ。

우리 CB야마노우치CZ와 CB에치고 우에스기CZ는
대대로 가까웠네. CB에치고CZ는 사라졌어도,
그 가재 CB나가오CZ는 내 일가나 다름없지.

direct_pc_sources.en: This CBYamanouchi Uesugi ClanCZ of mine has been on amicable terms with the CBEchigo Uesugi ClanCZ for generations. The CBEchigo Uesugi ClanCZ may be no more, but their conservators, the CBNagao ClanCZ, are as kin to us.
direct_pc_sources.jp:
我がCB山内上杉家CZは代々CB越後上杉家CZとは懇意の
間柄。CB越後上杉家CZはすでにないが、
その家宰たるCB長尾家CZは我が身内も同然じゃ。
direct_pc_sources.sc:
我CB山内上杉家CZ和CB越后上杉家CZ代代都是
亲密无间。虽然CB越后上杉家CZ已经没了，
但是担任家宰的CB长尾家CZ和我亲如一家。
direct_pc_sources.tc:
我等CB山內上杉家CZ與CB越後上杉家CZ代代交好。
CB越後上杉家CZ雖已滅亡，但一家之長的
CB長尾家CZ可是一家人啊。

direct_pc_sources.en: The essence of strategy is to seize victory without fighting. It is better to attack their spirit than their castle. Such tactics have won most of my battles.
direct_pc_sources.jp:
戦わずして勝つが兵法の極意。
城を攻めるは下策、心を攻めるを上策とす。
調略に勝てば、戦は八分勝っております。
direct_pc_sources.sc:
不战而胜，方是兵法之要。
攻城为下，攻心为上。
谋略上取胜，战事上便能有八分胜算。
direct_pc_sources.tc:
不戰而勝，方是兵法之要。
攻城為下，攻心為上。
謀略上能取勝，戰事上便有八分勝算。

共謀者を密告した過去があった…

反而将共谋者告发……

direct_pc_sources.en: I have fought on uncountable battlefields. I never once feared death. And I still do not, but...
direct_pc_sources.jp:
数え切れぬほど何度も戦場を駆けてきた。
されど、一度も死を恐れたことはなかった。
今さらあがこうとも思わぬ…ただ…
direct_pc_sources.sc:
过去曾无数次地奔赴战场。
但一次都没有恐惧过死亡。
事到如今更不想再挣扎……只是……
direct_pc_sources.tc:
他奔馳在無數的戰場，
可是從未畏懼過死亡。
如今已經不會想篡位……只不過……

direct_pc_sources.en: Starting with CCIzumoCZ, former Izumo Agent CATsunehisaCZ laid the foundations for the CBAmago ClanCZ. He extended its might throughout the surrounding countries in a single generation, proving himself an exemplary daimyª of the era.
direct_pc_sources.jp:
CB尼子家CZは、出雲守護代だったCA経久CZが
一代でCC出雲CZを始め周辺国に勢力を伸ばし、
基盤を築いた典型的な戦国大名であった。
direct_pc_sources.sc:
CB尼子家CZ在担任出云守护代的CA经久CZ一代，
将势力范围扩张至周边的CC出云CZ等国家，
成为了根基扎实的典型战国大名。
direct_pc_sources.tc:
CB尼子家CZ乃因出雲守護代的CA經久CZ進攻
CC出雲CZ及周邊國家後成功擴展勢力，
而奠定昌盛基石的典型戰國大名。

CB新宮党CZのCA国久CZ様、CA誠久CZ様の振る舞いは

direct_pc_sources.jp:
CA大内政弘CZは、応仁の乱で西軍の重鎮となり、
その子・CA大内義興CZはCA細川高国CZと結んで上京。
管領代として幕政を取り仕切った。
direct_pc_sources.sc:
CA大内政弘CZ在应仁之乱中担任西军核心。
其子CA大内义兴CZ则与CA细川高国CZ结伴上京，
作为管领代分担幕府政务。
direct_pc_sources.tc:
CA大內政弘CZ，於應仁之亂時成為西軍之重鎮，
其子‧CA大內義興CZ聯合CA細川高國CZ上京。
任管領代，掌理幕政。

간레이 대리로 막부를 이끌었다.

CA義興CZの子・CA義隆CZも在国の戦国大名としては
異例の従二位まで昇進し、栄華を誇ったが
CA陶晴賢CZの謀反により命を落とした。
direct_pc_sources.sc:
CA义兴CZ之子CA义隆CZ作为留守地方的战国大名，

破例地晉升至從二位，家道繁盛。
日後遭CA陶晴賢CZ謀反殞命。

원인으로는 CA[b1448]CZ와의 전쟁,

entries.current_quality_preservation_reason: Retain the current direct-PC-compatible dynamic name while restoring the three distinct historical theories in full syntax.

direct_pc_sources.en: Some suppose it was due to his fixation on the war against CA[b1448]CZ, or his desire to resolve the ongoing famine, or even to assist his son CAYoshinobuCZ in receiving a governing position.
direct_pc_sources.jp:
CA[b1448]CZとの戦いに専念するため、
飢饉の解決を願ったため、あるいは後継者の
CA義信CZに守護職を譲るため…など諸説ある。
direct_pc_sources.sc:
为了专心与CA长尾景虎CZ一战，
为了祈求饥荒平息，为了把守护一职
转让给继承人CA义信CZ……总之众说纷纭。
direct_pc_sources.tc:
為專心對抗CA長尾景虎CZ，
為平息飢荒災難祈禱，抑或為了繼位者的
CA義信CZ故讓出守護職等……眾說紛紜。

entries.historical_manual_compact_ko:
CA나가오 가게토라CZ와 싸우려 하거나,

CA미요시 나가요시CZ 동생들은 개성파.
그중 ‘오니소고’라 불린 맹장이

direct_pc_sources.en: CANagayoshi MiyoshiCZÖs younger brothers were all unique in their own right, but the one who stood out from the rest was the Ogre of Sogª, CAKazumasa SogªCZ.
direct_pc_sources.jp:
CA三好長慶CZの弟は個性派ぞろいだった
中でも「鬼十河」とあだ名される猛将が
CA十河一存CZである―
direct_pc_sources.sc:
CA三好长庆CZ的弟弟们个性十足，
其中就有以外号“鬼十河”闻名的
猛将CA十河一存CZ——
direct_pc_sources.tc:
CA三好長慶CZ饒富個性的弟弟們中，
以「鬼十河」之稱號聞名的猛將
CA十河一存CZ──

형 도와 전전하며 CB미요시CZ 위세 넓힌
공신. 하지만 서른 젊은 나이에

direct_pc_sources.en: He aided his brother in the capture of many territories and was instrumental in expanding the CBMiyoshi ClanCZÖs influence. But then, at the young age of thirty, he suddenly passed away...
direct_pc_sources.jp:
兄を助けて各地を転戦し、CB三好家CZの威勢を
拡張する功労者でもあった。
そう、数え三十の若さで世を去るまでは…
direct_pc_sources.sc:
他帮助哥哥转战各地，为CB三好家CZ声威远播
立下汗马功劳。
然而却在30岁时英年早逝……
direct_pc_sources.tc:
其人輔佐兄長轉戰各地，
為CB三好家CZ拓展江山立下了汗馬功勞。
然而卻於三十歲時英年早逝……

예! 그뿐만 아닙니다!
CB미요시CZ 안에선 CA마쓰나가CZ 님이
CA소고CZ 님을 저주했다는 소문도……
entries.current_quality_preservation_reason: No post-compaction current revision is present; restore the historical uncompressed Korean preimage without shortening.

direct_pc_sources.en: Yes, sir! But that isnÖt all! There are rumors spreading throughout the clan that say you, my lord CAMatsunagaCZ, placed a curse on Lord CASogªCZ...
direct_pc_sources.jp:
ははっ！　それどころではございませぬ！
CB三好CZ家中ではもっぱら…CA松永CZ殿がCA十河CZ殿を
呪詛したとの噂が流れており…
direct_pc_sources.sc:
是的！但更重要的是！
在CB三好CZ家内部……流传着是CA松永CZ大人
诅咒了CA十河CZ大人的谣言……
direct_pc_sources.tc:
是的！不僅如此！
現在CB三好CZ家內部……還有人在謠傳
是CA松永CZ大人咒殺了CA十河CZ大人……

entries.current_ko:
그러고 보니 CA소고CZ 님은 회색 말
좋아하시죠. 하지만 그 말을 타고
이 온천에 오긴 몹시 위험합니다.
entries.current_quality_preservation_reason: No post-compaction current revision is present; restore the historical uncompressed Korean preimage without shortening.

direct_pc_sources.en: I hear youÖre quite fond of that grey horse of yours. ItÖs quite risky to ride it up here, you know.
direct_pc_sources.jp:
時に…CA十河CZ殿は芦毛の馬を好まれるとか
しかし、この湯へその馬でお越しになるのは
剣呑というものですなあ。
direct_pc_sources.sc:
听说……CA十河CZ大人很喜欢芦毛马
但是，骑那匹马到这个温泉附近
是非常凶险的行为。
direct_pc_sources.tc:
CA十河CZ大人鍾愛蘆毛馬一事時有所聞……
不過騎著這匹馬到這座溫泉，
還真是讓人捏了一把冷汗啊。

entries.current_ko:
소문이지만 이곳 수호신 아리마
곤겐은 회색 말을 싫어한다지요……
미신일지라도 조심하십시오.
entries.current_quality_preservation_reason: No post-compaction current revision is present; restore the historical uncompressed Korean preimage without shortening.

direct_pc_sources.en: Word has it, the deity of this place, Arima Gongen, dislikes that color horse. ItÖs likely just superstition, but you might want to be careful all the same.
direct_pc_sources.jp:
巷の噂ではありますが、当地の鎮守である
有馬権現は芦毛がお嫌いとの話…
ま、迷信やも知れぬが、お気をつけられよ。
direct_pc_sources.sc:
只是街头巷尾的传说而已，据说镇守当地的
有马权现很讨厌芦毛马……
也许只是迷信，但还是小心为上啊。
direct_pc_sources.tc:
坊間盛傳，往昔鎮守該地的
有馬權現很討厭蘆毛馬……
雖說可能只是迷信，還是小心為上啊。

entries.current_ko:
신불 무시하는 CA마쓰나가CZ가 할 말인가.
내 애마에 트집이라니 무례하군……
불쾌하다. 돌아가겠다!
entries.current_quality_preservation_reason: No post-compaction current revision is present; restore the historical uncompressed Korean preimage without shortening.

direct_pc_sources.en: All this from you? The CAMatsunagaCZ I know has no regard for the gods! You simply mean to throw insults at me, but I will not have it! I bid you farewell!
direct_pc_sources.jp:
神仏を歯牙にもかけぬCA松永CZがそれを言うか。
我が愛馬に難癖をつけるとは失敬千万…
不愉快だ。帰らせてもらう！
direct_pc_sources.sc:
对神佛都不屑一顾的CA松永CZ居然说出这种话。
还对我的爱马指手画脚，太无礼了……
没意思，我要回去了！
direct_pc_sources.tc:
這是不信神佛的CA松永CZ會說的話嗎？
敢挑我愛馬的毛病，實在無禮……
真不愉快，我要回去了！

뭐라고…… 아리마 곤겐 소문대로인가.
오니소고가 낙마하다니……
내게 의심이 갈 만도 하군.

direct_pc_sources.en: What...? So the Arima Gongen legend was true...? How in the world could the Ogre of Sogª have fallen off his horse?! And how could anyone blame me?!
direct_pc_sources.jp:
なんと…有馬権現の噂どおりに、か
戦上手の鬼十河がまさかの落馬とは…
道理でわしに疑いがかかるわけ、か。
direct_pc_sources.sc:
什么……和有马权现的传说一样吗。
勇猛善战的鬼十河居然会从马上摔下来……
难怪要怀疑我了。
direct_pc_sources.tc:
什麼……和有馬權現的傳說一樣嗎。
驍勇善戰的鬼十河竟會落馬……
也難怪我會被懷疑了。

entries.current_ko:
CA소고 가즈마사CZ는 병사·낙마설이
엇갈려도, 당시부터 지금까지
CA히사히데CZ 암살설은 끊이지 않는다.
entries.current_quality_preservation_reason: No post-compaction current revision is present; restore the historical uncompressed Korean preimage without shortening.

direct_pc_sources.en: Some say CAKazumasa SogªCZ fell off his horse, while others claim he died of illness. Whatever the case, the rumor that CAHisahideCZ was to blame continues to this day.
direct_pc_sources.jp:
CA十河一存CZは病死したとも落馬したとも
伝えられるが、当時から現在に至るまで
CA久秀CZが暗殺したとの噂は絶えない。
direct_pc_sources.sc:
不管CA十河一存CZ到底是病死的
还是落马摔死的，从当时到现在，
CA久秀CZ暗杀的说法从未断绝。
direct_pc_sources.tc:
無論CA十河一存CZ的死因是病死還是落馬，
時至今日，

我らこれよりCB越後勢CZに斬り込み討死せん！

entries.current_ko:
CA나가요시CZ 병약해진 뒤,
CA마쓰나가 히사히데CZ와 각지서 공을
세워 CB미요시CZ 앞날도 탄탄해 보였다.
entries.current_quality_preservation_reason: No post-compaction current revision is present; restore the historical uncompressed Korean preimage without shortening.

direct_pc_sources.en: After CANagayoshiCZÖs health began to wane, the future of the CBMiyoshi ClanCZ seemed secure as its heir won battle after battle alongside CAHisahide MatsunagaCZ.
direct_pc_sources.jp:
CA長慶CZが病がちになった後は、
CA松永久秀CZと共に各地を転戦して功を挙げ、
CB三好家CZの未来も安泰と思われていた。
direct_pc_sources.sc:
在CA长庆CZ患病之后，
他就与CA松永久秀CZ一起转战各地，建立功勋，
所有人都以为CB三好家CZ会有安康的未来。
direct_pc_sources.tc:
其在CA長慶CZ病倒之後，
和CA松永久秀CZ一起轉戰各地，屢建奇功。
眾人因此都看好CB三好家CZ的未來。

review_judgement.linebreak_policy: Keep Korean clause boundaries only. Japanese source line breaks were not copied as a layout rule.
review_judgement.source_comparison: Direct PC JP/EN/SC/TC strings are retained above as the semantic witnesses; the legacy full Korean preimage is recovery material, and current revisions are preserved only when their source coverage remains complete.

judgement_groups.reason: The current row still equals the historical compact text. Restore the exact historical uncompressed Korean preimage, retaining its Korean semantic clause boundaries.
The strict current row differs from the historical compact text. The later source-driven wording or runtime-token revision takes precedence over legacy recovery material.

These rows retain direct-PC-compatible current terminology or runtime tokens, but source comparison found clauses still abbreviated. The proposal restores every clause without reverting the current control signature.
Direct-PC comparison identified a semantic Korean wording, terminology, grammar, completeness, or clause-boundary correction beyond a blind legacy restoration.
Legacy recovery text lacks or uses an obsolete runtime token/control form. Preserve the current direct-PC-compatible form rather than restoring old literal names or tokens.
These restored or preserved strings already use four Korean semantic lines and pass the static-patch-007 912px gate; do not compress them back to three lines.
These strings are naturally two Korean semantic lines; adding a forced line break is not required.
Capacity uses the conservative current full-name reservation and the required 30/48 scale. It does not assert a runtime-proven scene measurement.

layout_baseline.dynamic_name_reservations: v2 full-name reservation catalog scaled by 30/48; runtime_proven=false and scene_limited=false

reservation_policy.name_lookup: numeric suffix selects the same ID in MSG_PK/JP/msgev.bin
reservation_policy.runtime_prefix_semantics: not assumed; every prefix reserves the entire referenced name
